CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN.description: Claude Code OAuth token from `claude setup-token`; skips interactive login (user-scoped, optional)

FEDCOURTS_COURTLISTENER_API_TOKEN.description: CourtListener REST API token, required by `fedcourts pull` (user-scoped, optional)

AWS_SSO_START_URL.description: IAM Identity Center start URL (maintainer path; optional, corpus access only)

AWS_SSO_ACCOUNT_ID.description: AWS account ID for the SSO profile (maintainer path)

AWS_SSO_ROLE_NAME.description: Identity Center permission set name (maintainer path)

AWS_RO_ROLE_ARN.description: Read-only corpus role ARN assumed via the SSO profile (maintainer path)

AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID.description: Read-only corpus IAM user's access key ID (contributor path; optional, corpus access only)

AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY.description: Read-only corpus IAM user's secret access key (contributor path)

CORPUS_REMOTE_URL.description: Corpus remote S3 URL (optional, corpus access only)
